task_description: Write a wrapper shell script that dispatches cli-devin with documented flags only. The operator passes a flag list including one hallucinated flag (--reasoning-effort, which does NOT exist per cli-devin SKILL.md line 227). Your wrapper must detect and reject the hallucinated flag, then emit a flag-verify.json report.

acceptance.rationale: hallucinated flag must NOT appear in dispatched command
verify report flags the rejected flag

allowlist.comment: Real cli-devin flags from references/cli-reference.md. --reasoning-effort is the canonical hallucination test.
